framework.name: PayPal AP2: No GA timeline, pilot phase language only
framework.description: PayPal uses exclusively conditional/future language ('could be applied', 'positioned to', 'pilots to validate'). No production date, no beta announcement, no SDK release. Published Sept 2025 — 6 months after their Feb 2025 agent commerce announcements. Still in specification/pilot phase.
framework.raw_quote: Payment Mandate pilots: Embedding Payment Mandate credentials in authorization flows so issuers and networks see agent presence and modality, while pilots to validate approval lift, step-up accuracy, and ecosystem readiness.

source.title: PayPal Community Blog | Agent Payments Protocol: Building Verifiable Trust for Agentic Commerce
